metaDescription: Post-cancer treatment nutrition support. Gut recovery, immune rebuilding, and weight management for cancer survivors in Winston-Salem, NC.
headline: Cancer treatment saved your life. Now let's help your body recover and rebuild.
subheadline: After treatment, your body needs rebuilding — and that starts with what you eat. Piedmont Nutrition Care works alongside your care team to support your recovery with targeted nutrition, helping you regain energy, manage weight changes, and nourish your body through healing.
agitation: Treatment took a toll on your body — your appetite changed, foods taste different, your energy is unpredictable, and your weight may have shifted in ways that feel out of your control. That's a normal response to what your body has been through.

Most post-treatment nutrition advice is generic: "eat healthy, stay hydrated." But your body has specific needs right now, and understanding what those are can make a real difference in how you feel day to day.
howItWorks: Jeanne builds a recovery-stage nutrition protocol that addresses the specific damage treatment caused: gut lining repair, microbiome recolonization, immune-supporting nutrient optimization, and energy restoration.
Your plan is coordinated with your oncology team and adapted to your current treatment phase — so that your nutrition works with your medical care, not in isolation from it.

testimonial.quote: As a cancer survivor struggling with weight and gut issues, I'm so grateful to have found Jeanne. She understands the science of food as well as how to share it with me, apply it to my specific needs, and guide me to helpful resources.
testimonial.author: Ann

subheadlineShort: After treatment, rebuilding starts with what you eat. We support your recovery with targeted nutrition alongside your care team.
agitationShort: Treatment changed your appetite, energy, and relationship with food. That's a normal response to what your body has been through.
Generic advice like "eat healthy" isn't enough. Your body has specific needs right now.
howItWorksShort: Jeanne assesses your gut damage from treatment, identifies nutrient deficiencies, and builds a protocol targeting immune recovery and digestive restoration.
Your plan accounts for treatment side effects — taste changes, nausea, inflammation — with foods that actually support healing.
